## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? Link the issue (e.g. Closes #123). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore / infra

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added / updated and `pnpm test` (or `node --test` for the changed package) passes locally.
- [ ] Lint / format passes (`pnpm lint`, `pnpm format`).
- [ ] Documentation updated (README / package README / `docs/`).
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or personal data added.
- [ ] All commits are signed off (`-s`) and, where required, signed (`-S`).
- [ ] For security- or privacy-affecting changes: requested review from a security reviewer (see `GOVERNANCE.md`).
- [ ] The "DEMO — not a real vote" banner and unaudited-status labeling are intact.
